quantlab_entrypoint: ReviewOnly external evidence ingestion through scripts/runIndependentValidation.sh, src/quantlab/integrations/independent_validation.py, src/quantlab/integrations/research_bus.py, and the Streamlit 大数据模拟 / 研究总线 views; QuantLab will read QBVS bundles as external evidence and will not write approved strategies without explicit user approval.
hard_guards: Do not connect to live trading.
Do not write QBVS artifacts into QuantLab approved strategy library without explicit user approval.
Do not treat Yahoo public-history evidence as account-tradable proof.
Reject any QBVS bundle that declares writes_quantlab_database=true, writes_quantlab_source=true, or ingestion_mode other than external_evidence_only.
Fast-screening candidates remain ReviewOnly until exact validation and user approval are present.
recommended_qbvs_next_actions: Run: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m qbvs.cli verify-handshake --ack handoff/quantlab_handshake_ack.json

Run: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m qbvs.cli audit-goal-readiness --summary runs/yahoo_public_200x200_pair_full_40000_exact/strategy_summary.csv --results runs/yahoo_public_200x200_pair_full_40000_exact/validation_results.csv --manifest runs/manifests/yahoo_public_200x200_pair_manifest.csv --moomoo-probe runs/moomoo_opend_probe_iteration26_after_sdk.json --handshake-ack handoff/quantlab_handshake_ack.json --output-dir runs/goal_readiness_audit_quantlab_ack_20260605_from_quantlab_thread
Resume only the smallest verification needed to satisfy the active QBVS pursuing goal.
Do not trigger OpenD batch refetch until historical K-line quota recovers.
If continuing before OpenD quota recovery, use quota-safe public-history or replacement-to-200 resumable campaign paths only.
known_non_ack_blockers: OpenD historical K-line quota is still constrained; batch 81-140 has 39 opend_quota_exhausted items.
BRK-B provider alias is snapshot-confirmed as US.BRK.B; historical K-line confirmation should wait for OpenD quota recovery.
notes: QuantLab acknowledges QBVS as an external behavior-strategy validation layer. This ACK closes the missing QuantLab handshake file only; it does not approve strategy promotion, live trading, database mutation, OpenD refetch, or long-run validation by itself.
